title: QASC
description: Evolve a single-file solver independently for each QASC validation science question with two supporting facts in the local context.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first available answer choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved QASC question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the best answer string for the current multihop science question.
